message:
fix: add missing wa-robot-rules-lint.json schema and fix timing-dependent merge key test

replay_capture: test_merge_key_stream_kind_ordering sorted full merge keys
whose primary sort key is recorded_at_ms (wall clock). When capture_egress
and capture_lifecycle get different timestamps, sort order is by time, not
stream_kind. Fix: sort only the stream_kind field, which is what the test
actually validates.

api_schema: add wa-robot-rules-lint.json to match the registered endpoint
in SchemaRegistry::canonical(), fixing registered_schema_files_exist_on_disk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
